description_long: This object is a classic commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings, and a conventional tail assembly. The exterior is primarily white with a blue and black accent stripe running along the windows, and the tail fin features a blue logo. The airplane has two engines mounted under the wings, typical of mid-20th-century jetliners. The landing gear is visible and appears to be in a tricycle configuration, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with a row of passenger windows extending along the sides. The overall design suggests a focus on passenger transport, with a sleek, aerodynamic profile and a robust, metallic construction.
description: A classic white commercial jet airliner with swept-back low wings, underwing engines, and a blue-accented tail fin. Features a forward cockpit, tricycle landing gear, and a streamlined fuselage with passenger windows.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the nose, cockpit windows, forward fuselage, and the underwing engines with the landing gear extended.
description_view_1: Top and side view highlighting the full wingspan, tail fin with blue logo, and the arrangement of passenger windows along the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edge of the wings with visible engine nacelles.
description_view_3: Angled top-rear view emphasizing the swept-back wings, tail fin, and the overall aerodynamic shape of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
